category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-India Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against India BIS registration, ALMM project listing expectations, and CEA grid-connectivity requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与印度 BIS 注册、ALMM 项目列名要求及 CEA 并网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與印度 BIS 登記、ALMM 專案列名要求及 CEA 併網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BIS registration decision, grid-connection approval, customs determination, subsidy eligibility decision, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Indian BIS, MNRE/ALMM, CEA, distribution-company, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BIS 注册决定、并网批准、海关裁定、补贴资格决定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行印度 BIS、MNRE/ALMM、CEA、配电公司及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BIS 登記決定、併網批准、海關裁定、補貼資格決定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行印度 BIS、MNRE/ALMM、CEA、配電公司及專案要求。

answer_first.en: BIS registration to IS 16221/IEC 62109, ALMM listing for government or subsidised projects, and CEA grid connectivity are the gaps.
answer_first.zh: IS 16221/IEC 62109 的 BIS 注册、政府或补贴项目所需的 ALMM 列名，以及 CEA 并网要求是主要差距。
answer_first.zht: IS 16221/IEC 62109 的 BIS 登記、政府或補貼專案所需的 ALMM 列名，以及 CEA 併網要求是主要差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, distribution company, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
